1.gl: evil (as destructive), literally (ruin) or morally (especially guile); figuratively idolatry (as false, subjective), uselessness (as deceptive, objective; also adverbially, in vain)
1.dv: or שַׁו; from the same as H7722 (שׁוֹא) in the sense of desolating;

1.gl: properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e. guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.
1.kj: beward, be circumspect, take heed (to self), keep(-er, self), mark, look narrowly, observe, preserve, regard, reserve, save (self), sure, (that lay) wait (for), watch(-man).

1.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
1.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
1.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)

2.gl: to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)

2.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry
2.kj: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurk

2.gl: evil (as destructive), literally (ruin) or morally (especially guile); figuratively idolatry (as false, subjective), uselessness (as deceptive, objective; also adverbially, in vain)
2.dv: or שַׁו; from the same as H7722 (שׁוֹא) in the sense of desolating;

2.gl: literally, to load up (on the back of man or beast), i.e. to start early in the morning
2.kj: (arise, be up, get (oneself) up, rise up) early (betimes), morning.
2.dv: a primitive root; properly, to incline (the shoulder to a burden); but used only as denominative from H7926 (שְׁכֶם);

2.kj: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

3.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
3.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

3.gl: properly, something inherited, i.e. (abstractly) occupancy, or (concretely) an heirloom; generally an estate, patrimony or portion
3.kj: heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare H5158 (נַחַל).

3.gl: the belly, especially the womb; also the bosom or body of anything
3.kj: belly, body, [phrase] as they be born, [phrase] within, womb.
3.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be hollow;

3.gl: payment of contract; concretely, salary, fare, maintenance; by implication, compensation, benefit
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
3.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

5.gl: to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)

5.kj: (be, make, bring to, cause, put to, with, a-) shamed(-d), be (put to) confounded(-fusion), become dry, delay, be long.
